_comment: M&M 3e abilities — from the d20 Hero SRD (OGL). Cost: 2 character points per ability rank. No modifier conversion; rank IS the modifier.

strength.name: Strength
strength.special: Determines close damage (unarmed = Str rank), lifting capacity, and Athletics checks.
strength.absent: Cannot exert physical force; no physical form or cannot move.

stamina.name: Stamina
stamina.special: Base Toughness = Stamina rank. Base Fortitude = Stamina rank.
stamina.absent: No physical body or not a living being. Uses object damage rules. No Fortitude defense. Cannot use extra effort.

dexterity.name: Dexterity
dexterity.special: Base ranged attack bonus = Dexterity rank.
dexterity.absent: Cannot manipulate objects or make ranged attacks.

agility.name: Agility
agility.special: Base Dodge = Agility rank. Base Initiative = Agility rank. Halved when vulnerable, 0 when defenseless.
agility.absent: Cannot move under own power. No Dodge defense.

fighting.name: Fighting
fighting.special: Base close attack bonus = Fighting rank. Base Parry = Fighting rank. Halved when vulnerable, 0 when defenseless.
fighting.absent: Cannot make close attacks (may still use ranged if has Dexterity).

intellect.name: Intellect
intellect.absent: Automaton with no free will. Immune to mental effects. No Will defense (via Intellect path).

awareness.name: Awareness
awareness.special: Base Will = Awareness rank. Intuition and common sense.
awareness.absent: Completely unaware; also has no Presence. Is an inanimate object.

presence.name: Presence
presence.absent: Cannot interact. Immune to interaction skills. No Will defense (via Presence path).

defense_costs._note: Defense ranks above the base ability rank cost 1 character point per rank.

toughness.note: Cannot buy Toughness directly; use Protection effect or Defensive Roll advantage
